channel.title: SEC Press Releases
channel.description: Latest press releases from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

item.title: SEC Charges Investment Adviser With Misleading Disclosures
item.description: The SEC announced charges against an adviser over fee disclosures.

item.title: SEC Adopts Amendments to Modernize Filing Rules
item.description: New amendments take effect in Q4.

item.title: Statement on Market Structure
item.description: A staff statement with no guid element.
